subcodes.title: Du’a’-i-Muttasil bi-Salat
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! Verily, Thou art the Creator of the heavens and the earth and all that lieth between. Thou hast ever existed before all things, and Thou shalt continue to exist after the extinction of all things [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله المتعالی المنیع. سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انک خالق السموات و الارض و ما بینهما لم تزل کنت کائناً قبل کل شیء و لا تزال انک کائن بعد فناء کل شیء
subcodes.subjects: @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
